t.div: Drag field types from the palette to add fields.

i.class: fa fa-object-group fa-2x mb-2 d-block text-muted

div.small: Drag to move all. Press Delete to remove all.

t.div:
Select an element on the canvas to edit its properties.
Tip: Drag items from the toolbar onto the canvas. Hover over a shape and drag from the connector dots to create connections. Shift+click to multi-select. Ctrl+C/V to copy/paste.

textarea.placeholder: Use the Field Builder or type manually

t.p: No process maps found. Create one from the Process Maps list.

ProcessMapperCanvas.onResizeStep: (id, x, y, w, h) => this.onResizeStep(id, x, y, w, h)
